Fintech · Branding & Social Media

Musaffa
Halal Fintech Platform

Client
Musaffa
Category
Fintech · Branding & Social Media
Year
2023–2024
Status
Completed

Overview

Musaffa is the world's first trusted Halal trading platform, dedicated to helping ethically conscious investors screen stocks and ETFs for Shariah compliance. Ninearc was engaged to establish Musaffa as a recognised brand in the halal investing space and build awareness among a growing community of Muslim investors across Canada and beyond.

The Challenge

The challenge was to create a strong brand identity while educating users on Halal trading and positioning Musaffa simultaneously as both a trusted resource and a community hub. The messaging had to be accessible to everyday investors while meeting the standards of ethically conscious, religiously observant audiences.

Our Approach

Ninearc developed a comprehensive branding strategy including logo design, color palette, and brand guidelines to reflect transparency, trust, and innovation. We executed a multi-platform social media campaign, creating engaging content about Halal investing and financial education. A key component was launching the Musaffa Channel — where the Musaffa team shares market insights, trending stocks, and investment tips, directly connecting with and growing their audience.
